label: The Slitwindow Bunkroom
description: The Slitwindow Bunkroom occupies a narrow compartment carved from the inspection hall’s former records bay, its void-black adamantine plates retained and cross-braced with riveted ferrocrete ribs. A high slit-window admits a constant wash of bruise-hued auroral light, subdued by lumen-baffles and layered blackout shutters. Fixed wall-bunks and a bolted locker-bank reduce the space to a disciplined geometry, while a brass-grilled vent and small scrubber intake enforce the Bastion-City’s quarantine regimen. A stamped aquila placard and tally-board of ration chits formalize the room’s function as sanctioned rest within a logistics-controlled tavern.
